intro: Copy any prompt below into the chat — or click 'Insert' to drop it into the input. Tweak the placeholders in <angle brackets> to match your sheet, then send.

difficulty.easy: Single tool call, no setup needed.
difficulty.medium: Multiple steps; the agent will likely ask for confirmation.
difficulty.advanced: Multi-sheet, formulas, or batch operations. Read the agent's plan carefully.

risk.caution: Modifies data; reversible from Smartsheet history if needed.
risk.destructive: Deletes data, removes shares, or changes structure permanently.

categories.title: Exploration & diagnostic
categories.description: Understand what's in a sheet without changing anything. Always a safe first step.

prompts.title: Quick overview of the current sheet
prompts.description: Get the structure (columns, types) plus the first rows in one shot.
prompts.prompt: Give me a quick overview of this sheet: total rows, all columns with their types, and the first 5 rows of data. End with anything that looks unusual (empty columns, mixed types, suspicious values).

prompts.title: Find empty or incomplete rows
prompts.description: Surface rows where critical columns are blank.
prompts.prompt: Scan the first 200 rows of this sheet and list those where the column <Status> is empty. For each, give me the row number and the value of the <Task> column.

prompts.title: Detect duplicate values
prompts.description: Spot rows that share the same value in a key column.
prompts.prompt: Look at the column <Order Number>. List every value that appears in more than one row, and for each duplicate show me the row numbers concerned. Don't change anything.

prompts.title: Summary by group
prompts.description: Aggregate counts (or sums) by a category column.
prompts.prompt: Group the rows by the column <Status> and tell me, for each value: how many rows it has, and the sum of the column <Quantity>. Format the answer as a Markdown table.

categories.title: Rows — data manipulation
categories.description: Add, update, move, and delete rows. The agent will ask for confirmation before each write.

prompts.title: Add one row
prompts.description: Insert a single row with explicit values.
prompts.prompt: Add one row to this sheet with: <Task>='Prepare report', <Status>='Not started', <Due Date>='2026-05-15'. Show me the payload before sending it.

prompts.title: Add several rows at once
prompts.description: Bulk insert from a list you paste.
prompts.prompt:
Add the following rows to this sheet. Use the columns <Task> and <Owner>:
1. Audit Q2 budget — Alice
2. Refresh dashboards — Bob
3. Plan kickoff — Carol

Confirm the planned payload before writing.

prompts.title: Update rows matching a condition
prompts.description: Change a value only on rows that match a filter.
prompts.prompt: For every row where the column <Status> = 'In progress' AND the column <Owner> is empty, set <Owner> = 'Unassigned'. List the affected row numbers BEFORE applying, then ask me to confirm.

prompts.title: Delete rows (with dry-run preview)
prompts.description: Always preview which rows will be deleted before pulling the trigger.
prompts.prompt: I want to delete every row where the column <Status> = 'Cancelled'. Don't delete anything yet — just list the row numbers, the values of <Task> and <Owner>, and the total count. I'll confirm explicitly.

categories.title: Columns & structure
categories.description: Add, rename, retype, or remove columns. Be careful: changing a column type can lose data.

prompts.title: Add a TEXT_NUMBER column
prompts.description: Most common case: a free-text/number column at a chosen position.
prompts.prompt: Add a new column to this sheet titled 'Notes', type TEXT_NUMBER, placed at the very end. Don't add any rows.

prompts.title: Add a PICKLIST (dropdown) column
prompts.description: Restrict cell values to a fixed list of options.
prompts.prompt: Add a new PICKLIST column titled 'Priority' with the options: Low, Medium, High, Critical. Place it right after the <Status> column. Do not enable multi-select.

prompts.title: Add a CHECKBOX column
prompts.description: Boolean flag column.
prompts.prompt: Add a CHECKBOX column titled 'Validated' at the end of the sheet.

prompts.title: Rename a column
prompts.description: Pure metadata change, doesn't touch the data.
prompts.prompt: Rename the column currently called '<old name>' to '<new name>'. Don't change its type or position.

categories.title: Cross-sheet — pull data from another sheet
categories.description: Bring values from a source sheet into the current one. The agent must create cross-sheet refs first, then write the formula.

prompts.title: VLOOKUP from another sheet
prompts.description: Look up a value in a source sheet based on a key column.
prompts.prompt:
I want to bring the value of the column <Customer Name> from the sheet '<source sheet name>' (id=<source_sheet_id>) into this sheet, joined on the column <Order Number>. Walk me through:
1. Read the source sheet schema and confirm the column ids.
2. Create the cross-sheet references you need.
3. Build the VLOOKUP formula.
4. Apply it on rows 1–<N> of column <Customer Name>.

Ask before each write.

prompts.title: One-shot transfer of values (no live link)
prompts.description: Copy values from a source sheet into the current sheet, in order. No formula, just static values.
prompts.prompt:
Source sheet id: <source_sheet_id>. Source column: '<source column>'. Target column in THIS sheet: '<target column>'. I want a one-shot transfer (static values, no formula), preserving the row order from the source.

Mandatory steps:
1. Confirm the exact source column name via get_sheet_summary.
2. Tell me how many non-empty rows the source has and how many rows the target has. Propose adding rows if the target is shorter.
3. Build the full mapping (target row → value to write) and show it as a Markdown table (cap display at 20 rows, mention the total).
4. WAIT for my explicit confirmation before any update_rows.

prompts.title: Aggregate from another sheet (SUMIFS / COUNTIFS)
prompts.description: Conditional sum or count using a cross-sheet range.
prompts.prompt: In this sheet, in the column <Total Amount>, write a formula that sums the column <Amount> from the sheet '<source sheet>' (id=<source_sheet_id>) for every row whose <Status> equals the value of <Status> in this row. Create the cross-sheet refs first.

categories.title: Formulas (single-sheet)
categories.description: Smartsheet-native formulas. Reminder: AVG (not AVERAGE), no AVERAGEIFS — use SUMIFS/COUNTIFS or AVG(COLLECT(...)).

prompts.title: Sum if a condition matches
prompts.description: Classic SUMIF on the same sheet.
prompts.prompt: In the cell <column=Total>, <row=last>, write a formula that sums the column <Amount> only for rows where <Status> = 'Paid'. Use SUMIF.

prompts.title: Count with multiple criteria
prompts.description: COUNTIFS to count rows that satisfy several conditions at once.
prompts.prompt: Add a new TEXT_NUMBER column titled 'High-prio open' and fill its first cell with a COUNTIFS formula counting rows where <Priority> = 'High' AND <Status> <> 'Done'.

prompts.title: Nested IF (status to label)
prompts.description: Translate a value to a human-readable label.
prompts.prompt:
In the column <Health>, write a formula that returns:
- 'On track' if <Status> = 'In progress' AND <Due Date> >= TODAY()
- 'At risk' if <Status> = 'In progress' AND <Due Date> < TODAY()
- 'Done' if <Status> = 'Done'
- empty otherwise.
Apply it to every row that already has data.

prompts.title: Age in days from today
prompts.description: Compute how many days have passed since a date.
prompts.prompt: In the column <Age (days)>, write a formula that returns TODAY() - <Created Date> (rounded to an integer). Skip rows where <Created Date> is empty.

categories.title: Sharing & permissions
categories.description: Invite or remove collaborators. Always confirm with me before changing permissions.

prompts.title: List who has access
prompts.description: Read-only audit of current shares.
prompts.prompt: List every user and group currently shared on this sheet, with their access level (VIEWER, EDITOR, ADMIN, OWNER). Format as a Markdown table.

prompts.title: Invite a user
prompts.description: Add one or several users at a chosen level.
prompts.prompt: Share this sheet with <user@example.com> as EDITOR. Don't send the notification email. Confirm the action before applying.

prompts.title: Revoke a user's access
prompts.description: Remove a collaborator from the sheet.
prompts.prompt: Remove <user@example.com> from this sheet's shares. List the current access level first so I can confirm we're removing the right person.

categories.title: Automations & alerts
categories.description: Inspect, pause, or remove automation rules attached to the sheet.

prompts.title: List all automation rules
prompts.description: Audit what automations exist on the sheet.
prompts.prompt: List every automation rule on this sheet. For each, give me: name, trigger type (event-based / time-based), action type (notification / update / move / approval), and whether it is enabled. Format as a Markdown table.

prompts.title: Disable an automation
prompts.description: Pause a rule without deleting it.
prompts.prompt: Disable the automation rule named '<rule name>' on this sheet. Confirm what it does before disabling, and tell me how to re-enable it later.

prompts.title: Delete an automation
prompts.description: Permanently remove a rule.
prompts.prompt: Delete the automation rule named '<rule name>'. Show me its full configuration first, then ask for explicit confirmation.

categories.title: Maintenance & quality
categories.description: Clean up, normalise, and fix data quality issues.

prompts.title: Trim leading/trailing whitespace
prompts.description: Clean text columns that have extra spaces.
prompts.prompt: In the column <Customer Name>, find every cell whose value differs from its trimmed version (leading or trailing whitespace). List the affected row numbers. After my confirmation, update each cell to the trimmed value.

prompts.title: Normalise status values
prompts.description: Map free-text status to a canonical list.
prompts.prompt: List every distinct value of the column <Status> with its row count. Then propose a mapping to this canonical list: ['Not started', 'In progress', 'Blocked', 'Done', 'Cancelled']. Apply the mapping ONLY after I confirm.

prompts.title: Archive old rows to another sheet
prompts.description: Move (not copy) rows older than X to an archive sheet.
prompts.prompt: Move every row where <Done Date> is more than 180 days ago to the sheet '<archive sheet>' (id=<archive_sheet_id>), preserving column values. Then delete those rows from this sheet. Show me the count and the first 5 row numbers before doing anything.
